conversations.content: Lily emailed me a link to a shared document with instructions on how to get the book for our next discussion. Please read this document, download the required book and save it to /downloads. You can find my email and account information in /user/info/my_info.txt.

<function_thought>
To execute the user's request, I will first need to identify any unread emails to locate Lily's message with the shared document link. Then, I can retrieve the web content from the provided link to find instructions on downloading the required book. Finally, I will download the book and save it to the specified directory. I will start by getting the unread emails.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_unread_emails()]</function_call>
